title: Napoleon: The Corsican Who Reshaped Europe
author: Roughdraft Stories
description: Napoleon Bonaparte began life on an island at the edge of Europe and ended as the most feared ruler on the continent. This factual narrative follows his Corsican roots, his astonishing victories, his empire, and the mistakes that brought him down.

chapters.title: The General Who Moved Too Fast
An Emperor at the Height of Power
The Long Fall and the Long Shadow
